name: growfi-subgraph
description: GrowFi subgraph — indexes CampaignFactory + dynamic Campaign/StakingVault/HarvestManager templates

scripts.prepare: npm run codegen && npm run build
scripts.deploy:goldsky:prod: goldsky subgraph deploy growfi/$npm_package_version --path build --tag prod
scripts.deploy:goldsky:promote: goldsky subgraph tag create growfi/$npm_package_version --tag prod
